description: Re-architect the 'monitor-stack' Docker Compose project to remove the direct Docker socket mount from the 'monitor' service. Implement a 'proxy' service using nginx:alpine that mounts /var/run/docker.sock, exposes it on port 2375, and restricts traffic to GET requests only. Update the 'monitor' service to connect to the proxy via TCP using DOCKER_HOST=tcp://proxy:2375 and ensure the stack is running.
